text.title: QA Edge Case Spec Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does this tricky scenario warrant a pinned, versioned spec?

branch.question: Is there ≥ 1 evidence link (Sentry issue, PR, ticket, post-mortem)?

branch.conclusion: Fill the full spec using `templates/skeleton.md`. Use `r2-evidence-fields` to attach evidence, `r3-version-and-owner` for the header.
Block. Resolve evidence before filling the spec — unevidenced specs decay into folklore.
Skip the spec. Write an inline pytest comment + `pytest.mark.regression` against the originating issue id instead.

example.p: Sentry issue #12345 reproduces ~5×/year, alice owns checkout-qa, PR #9981 fixed it. → warrants full spec → conclusion r1-fixed-shape.
